description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the node:8.9 Docker image with a global before_script that runs `npm install gitbook-cli -g`, `gitbook fetch latest`, and `gitbook install`, and caches the `node_modules/` directory. Define two stages, test and deploy. In the test stage add a `test` job that executes `gitbook build . public`, runs on all branches except `master` (only on branches), and does not produce artifacts. In the deploy stage add a `pages` job that also runs `gitbook build . public`, publishes the `public/` directory as a GitLab Pages artifact that expires in one week, and runs only on the `master` branch.
